name: add_comm
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop

theorem add_comm (a b : ℕ) : a + b = b + a := by
  induction' a with k hk
  · simp
  · simp [Nat.add_succ, Nat.succ_add]
    rw [hk]
    rfl
```

```lean4
import Mathlib

theorem natural_add_associativity (a b c : ℕ) : (a + b) + c = a + (b + c) := by
  induction' c with k hk
  · simp
  · simp [Nat.add_comm, hk]
```

name: succ_inj
output:
```lean
import Mathlib
import Aesop

theorem Nat.succ_injective : Function.Injective (Nat.succ) := by
  intro n m h
  cases n with
  | zero =>
    cases m with
    | zero => rfl
    | succ m => simp at h
  | succ n =>
    cases m with
    | zero => simp at h
    | succ m => exact Nat.succ_injective h
```

```lean4
theorem list_length_append (xs ys : List α) : (xs ++ ys).length = xs.length + ys.length := by
```

name: list_filter_def
output:
```lean4
def filter (p : α → Bool) (xs : List α) : List α :=
  match xs with
  | [] => []
  | x :: xs' => if p x then x :: filter p xs' else filter p xs'
```

name: or_comm
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop

theorem disjunction_comm (P Q : Prop) : P ∨ Q ↔ Q ∨ P := by
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h
    cases h with
    | inl h₁ => right; exact h₁
    | inr h₂ => left; exact h₂
  · intro h
    cases h with
    | inl h₁ => right; exact h₁
    | inr h₂ => left; exact h₂
```

name: double_negation
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop

theorem double_negation (P : Prop) [Decidable P] : ¬¬P ↔ P := by
  apply Decidable.em (¬¬P ↔ P)
  · intro h
    have := h (Classical.em P)
    simp at this
    tauto
  · intro h
    apply Classical.em
```

name: demorgan_or
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop

theorem de_morgan_law : ¬(P ∨ Q) ↔ ¬P ∧ ¬Q := by
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h
    constructor
    · intro hp
      apply h
      left
      exact hp
    · intro hq
      apply h
      right
      exact hq
  · intro h
    intro h2
    cases h2 with
    | inl hp =>
      have ¬p := h.1
      exfalso
      apply ¬p
      exact hp
    | inr hq =>
      have ¬q := h.2
      exfalso
      apply ¬q
      exact hq
```

name: comp_injective
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop

theorem Function.comp_injective {X Y Z : Type} (f : X → Y) (g : Y → Z)
    (hf : Function.Injective f) (hg : Function.Injective g) :
    Function.Injective (g ∘ f) := by
  intro x₁ x₂ h
  apply hf
  apply hg
  exact h
```
